chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3744 - وَ كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ اَلْحُسَيْنِ زَيْنُ اَلْعَابِدِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ لِقَهْرَمَانِهِ إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَشْتَرِيَ لِي مِنْ حَوَائِجِ اَلْحَجِّ شَيْئاً فَاشْتَرِ وَ لاَ تُمَاكِسْ

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3744 - Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain Zayn Al-Abidin (as) used to say to his steward:
"If you intend to buy something for me from the needs of Hajj, then buy it and do not bargain."
